_comment: Veve adjacency matrices for Kuramoto coupled oscillator engine. Each preset defines WHICH oscillators pull on each other. The topology is derived from actual veve geometric forms (Rigaud, 1974). Row i, column j: does oscillator j pull on oscillator i? adj is row-major flattened (36 values for 6x6).

presets.name: All-to-all
presets.description: Every oscillator couples to every other. Maximum synchronization potential.
presets.predicted_behavior: Classic Kuramoto: smooth transition from free to locked as K increases.

presets.name: Legba Carrefour
presets.description: Center hub connects to all 5. Arms connect only to center. Star topology.
presets.predicted_behavior: Strong leader-follower. Center entrains all arms. Arms don't influence each other.

presets.name: Carrefour Diamond
presets.description: 5 nodes fully connected in diamond. 6th node peripheral through node 4.
presets.predicted_behavior: Near-all-to-all lock for 5 core voices. One outsider drifts — rhythmic tension.

presets.name: Ferraille
presets.description: V-graph: junction connects to 2 tips. Oscillators 3-5 completely free.
presets.predicted_behavior: Two-against-one lock + 3 free voices. Fractured groove at high K.

presets.name: Ogou Bhathalah
presets.description: 3 diamond centers in chain (L-M-R). Star endpoints at vertices. Zigzag topology.
presets.predicted_behavior: Wave propagation L-to-M-to-R. Sync cascades along the chain — rolling groove.

presets.name: Legba co-sou
presets.description: Nearest-neighbor ring. Each oscillator connects to its 2 immediate neighbors.
presets.predicted_behavior: Traveling wave. Phase patterns rotate — circular rhythm cascade.

presets.name: Marassa
presets.description: Mirrored twins on shared axis. Two triangles (0-1-2, 3-4-5) bridged at 2-3 (0.5). Twins are connected, not isolated.
presets.predicted_behavior: Twin groups lock internally. Weak bridge creates cross-talk — lobes drift then re-sync.

presets.name: Damballah Wedo
presets.description: Linear chain 0-1-2-3-4-5. Sync propagates like a wave from head to tail.
presets.predicted_behavior: Phase wave — each oscillator entrains its neighbor. Ripple effect. Delay-line groove.

presets.name: Erzulie Freda
presets.description: Two triangles sharing apex (node 0). Bridge node 5 connects lobe tips. Weighted: bridge at 0.5.
presets.predicted_behavior: Two lobes lock internally. Bridge creates weak cross-talk — lobes drift then re-sync.

presets.name: Baron Samedi
presets.source: Rigaud p.579 — Guédèh (latticed cross with coffin)
presets.description: Latticed cross with 4 corner crosses and coffin. Center hub (0) with 4 arms. Cross-bracing: 1-3 and 2-4 diagonal at 0.4. Node 5 (grave) weak to center.
presets.predicted_behavior: Hub dominates. Diagonals create secondary sync paths at 40% strength — ghost rhythms.

presets.name: Simbi
presets.source: Rigaud p.404 — Sim'bi Yamphaca (three branches from root)
presets.description: Root basin (0) feeds 3 branch bases (1,3,5). Two branches extend to tips (1-2, 3-4). Fan/tree from shared root.
presets.predicted_behavior: Root entrains all branches. Tips follow with delay. Three-way phase spread.

presets.name: Ayizan
presets.source: Rigaud p.471 — Ayizan (palm frond with spine and branches)
presets.description: Central spine 0-1-2-3. Branches: 1-4 and 2-5. Spine at full strength, branches at 0.7.
presets.predicted_behavior: Spine locks first. Branches follow with slight lag — palm-frond sway.

presets.name: Gran Bwa
presets.source: Rigaud p.585 — Grand Bois d'Ileh (anthropomorphic tree figure)
presets.description: Anthropomorphic tree: body/trunk hub (1) connects head (0), arms (2,3), root-feet (4,5). Roots intertwine at 0.5.
presets.predicted_behavior: Body/trunk dominates as hub. Head and arms follow independently. Root-feet develop sub-rhythm through 0.5 intertwining — underground pulse.
